summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of DreamerZ_Beta Learning Engine. All core features working correctly: JourneyPlayer, Quiz component, Progress tracking, and localStorage persistence.

issues: ProgressDashboard component with reset button exists but is not integrated into any page - reset functionality only available via localStorage clear

passed_tests: JourneyPlayer loads and displays module content with Learn/Example/Try It tabs
JourneyPlayer shows module sidebar with 8 modules for ChatGPT
JourneyPlayer module sidebar shows locked/unlocked/completed states correctly
JourneyPlayer 'Take Quiz to Continue' button appears for incomplete modules
Quiz displays MCQ questions with options A, B, C, D
Quiz displays True/False questions with 'TRUE OR FALSE' badge
Quiz shows correct answer highlighted green with checkmark after submission
Quiz shows incorrect answer highlighted red after wrong submission
Quiz 'Explain Answer' button shows explanation panel
Quiz retry functionality works after failing (67% < 70% threshold)
Quiz completion shows score, attempts, best score stats
Quiz passing (100%) triggers confetti animation
Progress saved to localStorage after quiz completion (key: dreamerz_beta_progress_v1)
Module unlocks after passing quiz (70% threshold)
Next Module button appears after passing quiz
Resume functionality - opens at first incomplete unlocked module
Reset progress clears all data (tested via localStorage.removeItem)
Tools page displays 5 tool cards (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Canva, Syllaby)
Tools page shows correct XP values and module counts
Tools page progress stats (Complete %, XP Earned) visible and update correctly
Navigation between pages works correctly
action_items: Consider integrating ProgressDashboard component into Tools page or creating a dedicated Progress page to expose the reset functionality to users
critical_code_review_comments: ProgressDashboard.jsx component exists with reset functionality but is not used in any route - users cannot reset progress via UI
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses localStorage for progress tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Learning Engine features working correctly. Quiz questions: Q1 (MCQ) correct answer is B (OpenAI), Q2 (True/False) correct answer is False, Q3 (MCQ) correct answer is B. Progress stored in localStorage with key 'dreamerz_beta_progress_v1'. Passing score is 70%. ProgressDashboard component exists but not integrated - reset only via localStorage clear.
mocked_api_note: AI endpoint has demo mode fallback - not tested in this iteration (frontend only)
